ddls:
CREATE TABLE "breweries" (
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brewery */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the brewery */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the brewery */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the brewery is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the brewery is located */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the brewery */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of brewery (e.g., Micro, Brewpub, Regional) */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the brewery's website */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the brewery */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* JSON field for storing opening hours */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the brewery */,
  "accessibility" INTEGER /* Boolean field indicating if the brewery is wheelchair accessible */,
  "services" TEXT /* JSON field for storing additional services */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brewery was founded */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to a featured image of the brewery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brewery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regular, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brewery being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review has been marked as helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_brewery_id FOREIGN KEY ("brewery_id") REFERENCES breweries ("brewery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location entry */,
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brewery associated with this location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the brewery */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the brewery */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the brewery's location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the brewery is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_brewery_id FOREIGN KEY ("brewery_id") REFERENCES breweries ("brewery_id")
)
